'''chahada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:noblesse|noblesse]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-h-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:noblesse|noblesse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chahada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæhædæth|chæhædæth]] || [[word:chæhædæj|chæhædæj]] || [[word:chæhædæsh|chæhædæsh]] || [[word:chæhædæ|chæhædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chahahadath|chahahadath]] || [[word:chahahadaj|chahahadaj]] || [[word:chahahadash|chahahadash]] || [[word:chahahada|chahahada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chahadath|chahadath]] || [[word:chahadaj|chahadaj]] || [[word:chahadash|chahadash]] || [[word:chahada|chahada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chahafdath|chahafdath]] || [[word:chahafdaj|chahafdaj]] || [[word:chahafdash|chahafdash]] || [[word:chahafdaf|chahafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chahadatha|chahadatha]] || [[word:chahadaja|chahadaja]] || [[word:chahadasha|chahadasha]] || [[word:chahadaka|chahadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chahadath|chahadath]] || [[word:chahadaj|chahadaj]] || [[word:chahadash|chahadash]] || [[word:chahada|chahada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chahadathal|chahadathal]] || [[word:chahadajal|chahadajal]] || [[word:chahadashal|chahadashal]] || [[word:chahadakal|chahadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chahadathatha|chahadathatha]] || [[word:chahadajaja|chahadajaja]] || [[word:chahadashasha|chahadashasha]] || [[word:chahadaka|chahadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chahadathan|chahadathan]] || [[word:chahadajan|chahadajan]] || [[word:chahadashan|chahadashan]] || [[word:chahadakan|chahadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chahadathaoro|chahadathaoro]] || [[word:chahadajaoro|chahadajaoro]] || [[word:chahadashaoro|chahadashaoro]] || [[word:chahadakaoro|chahadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
